requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence for Slovenia PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及斯洛文尼亚光伏逆变器要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及斯洛維尼亞光伏逆變器要求

summary.en: For Slovenia solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family. SIST is the national standards body, Agen-E oversees the energy sector, and ELES controls the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Slovenia applies EU CE marking requirements under LVD 2014/35/EU. Slovenian-language safety documentation and installation instructions are commonly expected by local authorities and installers.
summary.zh: 对于斯洛文尼亚太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备。SIST是国家标准机构，Agen-E监管能源行业，ELES控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。斯洛文尼亚依据低电压指令2014/35/EU执行欧盟CE标志要求。当地主管机构和安装商通常期望提供斯洛文尼亚语安全文件及安装说明。
summary.zht: 對於斯洛維尼亞太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備。SIST是國家標準機構，Agen-E監管能源行業，ELES控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。斯洛維尼亞依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU執行歐盟CE標誌要求。當地主管機構和安裝商通常期望提供斯洛維尼亞語安全文件及安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
LVD 2014/35/EU — CE marking mandatory for EU market access
SIST standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
Agen-E and ELES project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence for Slovenia projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Slovenia project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为斯洛文尼亚项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而斯洛文尼亚项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為斯洛維尼亞項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而斯洛維尼亞項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Slovenia IEC safety expectations or EU LVD CE marking requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, confirm that labels and manuals match the Slovenia configuration (including Slovenian-language requirements where applicable), document protection coordination and earthing, and verify that the technical file satisfies LVD 2014/35/EU. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Slovenia can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足斯洛文尼亚IEC安全要求或欧盟低电压指令CE标志要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，确认标签和手册匹配斯洛文尼亚配置（包括适用的斯洛文尼亚语要求），记录保护配合和接地，并验证技术文件满足低电压指令2014/35/EU。针对斯洛文尼亚对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足斯洛維尼亞IEC安全要求或歐盟低電壓指令CE標誌要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，確認標籤和手冊匹配斯洛維尼亞配置（包括適用的斯洛維尼亞語要求），記錄保護配合和接地，並驗證技術文件滿足低電壓指令2014/35/EU。針對斯洛維尼亞對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for EU market access in Slovenia. IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence is also required where Agen-E, ELES, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation requires IEC safety evidence for grid-connected PV inverters.
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Slovenia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Slovenia PV projects. CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is mandatory. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, align labels and manuals to Slovenia's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and provide documentation in Slovenian where required. Confirm current SIST, Agen-E, ELES, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯洛文尼亚光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。依据低电压指令2014/35/EU，CE标志为强制要求。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，使标签和手册匹配斯洛文尼亚230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并在必要时提供斯洛文尼亚语文件。出货前请确认现行SIST、Agen-E、ELES及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯洛維尼亞光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。依據低電壓指令2014/35/EU，CE標誌為強制要求。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，使標籤和手冊匹配斯洛維尼亞230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並在必要時提供斯洛維尼亞語文件。出貨前請確認現行SIST、Agen-E、ELES及項目業主安全要求。
